leadText: The Lucky Egg (Japanese: しあわせタマゴ Lucky Egg) is a type of item introduced in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The holding Pokémon gains 150% the experience it would otherwise gain. This effect stacks with other experience-increasing effects, such as different- OT Pokémon's naturally boosted experience gain. It does not affect experience gained from Auto Battles .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A Lucky Egg that's filled with happiness! Earns double XP for 30 minutes.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution 1.4.1.1 As a held item In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price G S C R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS BD SP N/A $ 100 S M US UM Sw Sh N/A $ 5,000 S V N/A $ 2,500 ZA N/A $ 750 In the Generation V games, the Lucky Egg can be sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 for $ 200. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The holding Pokémon gains 150% the experience it would otherwise gain. This effect stacks with other experience-increasing effects, such as different- OT Pokémon's naturally boosted experience gain. It does not affect experience gained from Auto Battles .
